job_description:
# Senior Data Analyst, Analytics Engineering
Company: Pearl Health
Source: Official company posting via Ashby
Employment type: Full-time
Checked: April 30, 2026
URL: https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/pearlhealth/4832509b-c607-4801-af71-5d361ed365fd/

## Highlights
- Remote or hybrid senior data analyst role at a value-based care / primary care healthtech company.
- Focuses on trusted data models, clinical outcomes, P&L, BI tools, patient spend, practice engagement, network analytics, documentation, Git-based workflow, testing, and CI/CD for analytics pipelines.
- Healthcare context includes Traditional Medicare and Medicare Advantage performance.
strengths: Strong healthtech, Medicare/Medicare Advantage, data modeling, BI, data quality, and analytics governance alignment.
Trusted datasets and quality/testing language maps to ETL validation and data reconciliation experience.
Remote option and healthcare outcomes focus are strong.
gaps: Analytics engineering expectations such as Git-based workflow, automated testing, and CI/CD are beyond the base resume and should be framed as adjacent or learning areas.
Senior role may require stronger modeling/dbt ownership than currently supported.
notes: Apply if time. Tailor toward healthcare data quality, BI/reporting validation, trusted data models, Medicare Advantage analytics, and cross-functional stakeholder support.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Senior Healthcare Data Analyst | Analytics Engineering | SQL Data Quality
